g.text: Parses ODE, extracts state dims, validates parameter space, detects model changes
Checks PINN cache validity → routes to fast path or retraining
Bayesian optimisation over KF · CF · K2 · K3 → minimise cabin RMS acceleration
Re-runs ground truth ODE on best θ · flags if PINN error > threshold
KF · CF · K2 · K3 + RMS report
Control synthesis · co-simulation · multi-objective sweep · design iteration
